title: Oak Lane area walkthrough
transcript_text:
Sarah Mitchell: We're on Oak Lane in Wimbledon today — postcode SW19 3PQ. Lovely tree-lined street.

Dr James Williams: Yes, this is number 16 Oak Lane. The garden backs onto the common.

Sarah Mitchell: Four bedrooms originally but you've converted the loft?

Dr James Williams: Correct, that's our home. Next door at number 14 is also on the market soon — different vendor.

Sarah Mitchell: For this property, condition is excellent. Recent kitchen renovation.

Dr James Williams: We're not rushing — maybe twelve months. Price expectation around £720,000.

Sarah Mitchell: I'll note the loft conversion and compare with recent SW19 3PQ sales.
summary_text: 16 Oak Lane SW19 3PQ valuation. Loft conversion, excellent condition, 12-month timeline, ~£720k expectation. Mentions neighbor at 14.
